== Notes for [[Item:Q115953|Q115953]] ==

Rodrigo Alonso de Asturias, Señor de Nava, que con su mujer Onía, tuvo a
http://freepages.genealogy.rootsweb.com/~pinofiel/alvarez_de_las_asturias_giron_zuniga.htm

===============================
Rodrigo Diaz Conde de Asturias y de Oviedo

Parents

Father: Diego Fernández, conde de Oviedo * c. 1020 Mother: Cristina Fernández de Astúrias * c. 1025

Marriages N

Children
* •Alvar Rodriguez

http://www.geneall.net/H/per_page.php?id=1624892

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
